name: qxex
description: Additional GUI widgets and utilities for qooxdoo apps.

info.description: Additional GUI widgets (in ui/*) and utilities (static/singleton Manager's in util/) for qooxdoo apps. These are extensions of core qooxdoo widgets, especially from the qx.ui.form and qx.ui.table packages.
info.name: qxex
info.summary: Additional GUI widgets and utilities for qooxdoo apps.

name: qxl.taskmanager
description: A manager for objects that represent background tasks

info.description: This package provides a manager for objects representing real tasks which are running in the background of the application. The manager offers bindable properties and events that allow you to visualize the progress of the task(s) or to determine the busy/idle state of the application.
info.name: qxl.taskmanager
info.summary: A manager for objects that represent background tasks

name: Commandline Testrunner for Qooxdoo Apps
description: A node based testrunner for qooxdoo unit tests. It uses a headles instance of chrome to execute tests. It uses the TAP protocol to communicate between the browserbased tests and the nodebased testruner.

info.description: The Testrunner looks for *.test classes in your application and runns all the tests contained therin. It follows the standard qooxdoo testing framework. You can continue using all the tests you wrote for qooxdoo 5.x.
info.name: Commandline Testrunner for Qooxdoo Apps
info.summary: A node based testrunner for qooxdoo unit tests. It uses a headles instance of chrome to execute tests. It uses the TAP protocol to communicate between the browserbased tests and the nodebased testruner.
